focus: The perfect 4th of July post: all upcoming ML picks + holiday personality + the +47u engine.
mechanic: Personality/holiday + card (our proven 'grilling weekend' format) with a holiday-tied RT line ('independence from the chalk')

verifiedBoard.France ML -475 (6u SUPER ELITE): $671K, 100% one-sided, 5 wallets, top whale sizing 38x, ~5 PM ET
verifiedBoard.Baltimore Orioles ML +109 (2.5u TOP+): $40K, 100%, 7 wallets, zero dissent, top wallet +$2.19M lifetime sizing 6.9x, ~7 PM ET
verifiedBoard.Milwaukee Brewers ML -149 (5u TOP+): money split 36% — listed WITHOUT sharp claim, ~9:45 PM ET
verifiedBoard.skipped: Morocco ML (already kicked off), Under 10.5 (in progress, and not ML)

hero_single.text:
Happy 4th. While the burgers hit the grill, the sharps are already working.

+47 units since June 1, and today's card is pure moneyline:

⚽ France ML (6u — our biggest play of the day)
100% of the sharp money. One proven winner sized up 38× his usual bet.

⚾ Orioles +109 — 7 proven winners, zero dissent, led by a +$2M career wallet
⚾ Rangers +100 — even money, sharps on the road side
⚾ Brewers ML (5u) — the late anchor

Two plus-money dogs on Independence Day.

Declare independence from the chalk.

Everything locks before first pitch — enjoy the fireworks, we'll bring ours.

alt_hooks: Two plus-money dogs on Independence Day. Declare independence from the chalk.
The sharps don't grill. Today's moneyline card is loaded — and two of them are plus money.

alternates.label: France SUPER lead (conviction angle)
alternates.text:
Our biggest play of the 4th: France ML, 6 units.

100% of the tracked sharp money is on one side, and one proven winner sized up 38× his normal bet to be there.

Behind it, two plus-money dogs the sharps actually like:
⚾ Orioles +109 — 7 proven winners, zero dissent
⚾ Rangers +100 — even money, road side

+47 units since June 1. The line doesn't take holidays.

Locks before kickoff — check the site.

alternates.label: reply-before-reveal (holiday engagement)
alternates.text:
4th of July special: two plus-money dogs on today's card, both with every tracked sharp on their side.

One is +109. One is +100.

Which one cashes — both, one, or neither?

Reply with your call before first pitch. We grade it tonight, fireworks included.

options.standalone_rt_line: Two plus-money dogs on Independence Day. Declare independence from the chalk.

playbook_checks.fresh_vs_earlier_posts_today: morning = receipts recap, midday = milestone flex, this = holiday card
